volumeHelp: Danna don samun damar faifan ƙara

statusLoadingDesc: Ana loda sigar da aka bayyana
statusUsingNoDesc: Amfani da sigar da ba a bayyana ba

alertDescribedVersion: Yin amfani da sigar wannan bidiyon da aka kwatanta da sauti
alertNonDescribedVersion: Amfani da sigar wannan bidiyon da ba a bayyana ba
fallbackError1: Yi haƙuri, burauzar ku ba zai iya kunna wannan ba
fallbackError2: An san masu bincike masu zuwa suna aiki tare da wannan mai kunnawa
prefIntroCaptions: Zaɓuɓɓukan da ke biyowa suna sarrafa yadda ake nuna rubutun kalmomi.
prefIntroDescription1: Wannan na'urar mai jarida tana goyan bayan bayanin odiyo ta hanyoyi biyu:
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Bidiyon na yanzu ba shi da bayanin sauti a kowane tsari.
prefIntroDescription3: Yi amfani da fom mai zuwa don saita abubuwan da kuka zaɓa masu alaƙa da kwatancen sauti na tushen rubutu.
prefIntroDescription4: Bayan kun ajiye saitunan ku, za a iya kunna bayanin sauti ta amfani da maɓallin Bayani.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Ana iya sarrafa mai kunna jarida a wannan shafin yanar gizon daga ko'ina akan shafin ta amfani da gajerun hanyoyin madannai (duba ƙasa don jeri).
prefIntroKeyboard2: Ana iya sanya maɓallan gyara (Shift, Alt, da Control) a ƙasa.
prefIntroKeyboard3: NOTE: Wasu haɗe-haɗe na iya yin karo da maɓallan da burauzarku ke amfani da su da/ko wasu aikace-aikacen software.
prefIntroTranscript: Zaɓuɓɓukan da ke gaba suna shafar rubutun m.
prefCookieWarning: Ajiye abubuwan da kuka zaɓa na buƙatar kukis.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Ana amfani da maɓallin gyara don gajerun hanyoyi
escapeKeyFunction: Rufe maganganu na yanzu ko menu na buɗewa
prefDescFormatHelp: Idan duka nau'ikan suna samuwa, ɗaya kawai za a yi amfani da su.
prefDescFormatOption1: madadin sigar bidiyo da aka bayyana
prefDescFormatOption2: bayanin tushen rubutu, wanda mai karanta allo ya sanar
prefDescPause: Dakatar da bidiyo ta atomatik lokacin da bayanin ya fara
sampleDescriptionText: Daidaita saituna don jin wannan samfurin rubutun.
prefHighlight: Hana rubutun kamar yadda kafofin watsa labarai ke takawa
prefNoChange: Ba ku yi wani canje-canje ba.
windowMoveAlert: Jawo ko amfani da maɓallan kibiya don matsar da taga;
windowSendBackAlert: Wannan taga yanzu yana bayan wasu abubuwa akan shafin.
windowBringTopAlert: Wannan taga yanzu yana gaban wasu abubuwa akan shafin.
resultsSummary4: Danna lokacin da ke da alaƙa da kowane abu don kunna bidiyo daga wannan batu.
aboutTitle: Game da Mai kunnawa Mai Iya
productNameWeb: Ɗabi'ar Yanar Gizo TOTHOM Mai Ikon
webEditionDescription: Keɓancewa da tsawaita bugu na Mai kunna mai iya samun damar mai kunnawa.
wpEditionDescription: plugin ɗin WordPress wanda ke ƙara widget ɗin Elementor, wanda aka ƙera don haɗa ƙa'idar da aka keɓance da tsawaita bugu na mai kunnawa mai isa ga mai kunnawa.
thirdPartyDescription: Wannan samfurin ya ƙunshi software mai buɗewa mai zuwa:
